text.title: gha-matrix-builds Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for gha-matrix-builds. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: Test matrix jobs MUST set fail-fast: false so that a failure on one combination does not cancel the remaining combinations.
rule.rationale: The default fail-fast: true hides failures on secondary platforms. You need the full cross-product result to triage regressions accurately.

rule.statement: Use exclude to remove invalid combinations and include to add special configurations with extra variables (e.g., coverage: true for one canonical combination).
rule.rationale: Phantom combinations waste CI minutes and can fail for unrelated reasons. Include allows attaching extra variables to a specific combination without duplicating the matrix.

rule.statement: When uploading artifacts from a matrix job, embed the matrix variables in the artifact name: name: build-${{ matrix.os }}-${{ matrix.node }}.
rule.rationale: Artifacts with the same name overwrite each other. Matrix-keyed names allow the downstream combine job to download-artifact with pattern: build-* and merge-multiple: true.

rule.statement: Set max-parallel only when runner quota is constrained; otherwise omit to let GHA schedule all combinations as fast as possible.
rule.rationale: Artificially serialising a matrix defeats its purpose. Throttle only when you know the concurrency limit of your runner pool.
